phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Swiss watch counter is
phrases.text_local: Wo finde ich die Schweizer Uhren?
phrases.cultural_note: Luxury watch sections in Swiss department stores are often grouped with high-end beauty or accessory counters.

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, next to the jewelry.

responses.english: On the ground floor, next to the jewelry.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if euro is accepted at register
phrases.cultural_note: Swiss retailers often accept euros but give change in Swiss francs unless the customer explicitly requests otherwise.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tax-free desk is
phrases.cultural_note: Tax-Free-Schalter are typically located near the main exit or customer service desk in Swiss department stores.

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, behind the cash register.

responses.english: On the ground floor, behind the cash register.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if loyalty card gives instant discount
phrases.text_local: Gibt es Rabatt mit der Kundenkarte?
phrases.cultural_note: Swiss loyalty programs like Manor Card typically apply instant discounts at checkout rather than later redemption.
